answers.where: Hangar pad in a bright Roblox-like block arena.
answers.action: Press BATTLE to start the next mech test.
answers.response: The visible mech uses a downloaded CC0 model with its atlas colors restored, standing on a studded pad.
answers.reward: The player sees salvage as the resource and a locked shoulder module as the next upgrade goal.
answers.game_look: Large toy mech silhouette, colored block props, raised studs, sky-blue background, readable engine-font HUD.

issues.text: Hero mech is now a real textured source asset, but future passes still need stronger customization-slot presentation.
